# Tool Versions and Analysis Environment

## System
- **OS:** Ubuntu analysis workstation (exact distribution version not recorded in this repository)
- **MATLAB:** R2025b
- **Brainstorm:** self-updating build used for the analysis; exact build/date not recorded

## Analysis settings used in this project
- **Condition:** Left median-nerve
- **Epoch window:** -100 to 300 ms
- **Noise covariance baseline:** -100 to 0 ms
- **Source method:** Minimum Norm, dSPM
- **Time–frequency method:** Morlet wavelets
- **Frequency range:** 4–80 Hz
- **TF display:** raw power; no baseline normalization in the exported view
- **Representative TF sensor:** MEG 1133

## Portfolio toolbox versions recorded in the shared environment
These packages are part of the broader neuroimaging portfolio environment; they were not all required for this specific MEG analysis.

- **SPM:** 25.01.02
- **CAT12:** 12.9
- **EEGLAB:** 2025.1.0
- **FieldTrip:** 20250928
- **BRAPH:** 2.0.1
- **FreeSurfer:** 8.1.0
- **FSL:** 6.0.7.19 (FEAT/MELODIC/FDT)
- **PETPVE12 (SPM):** 1.0

Documentation updated: 2026-07-15
